subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved and respected friend: Your letter written to Aga Mirza Ahmad was received. I likewise read it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست عزیز محترما نامه شما به آقا میرزا احمد رسید من نیز مطالعه کردم از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @man's distinction from the animal, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @power of the mind over nature
